title: EFL playoffs 2025-26: Schedule, results, how to watch, more as teams battle for promotion
text: ESPN coverage of the EFL playoffs for the 2025-26 season. League Two semi-final fixtures: Sunday, May 10, 3 p.m. — Grimsby Town 1-2 Salford City at Blundell Park. Sunday, May 10, 6 p.m. — Chesterfield 0-1 Notts County at SMH Group Stadium. Friday, May 15, 7.15 p.m. — Salford City vs Grimsby Town at Peninsula Stadium. Friday, May 15, 8 p.m. — Notts County vs Chesterfield at Meadow Lane. Bradford City lost 0-1 to Bolton Wanderers in their playoff semifinal second leg on Thursday, May 14, meaning Stockport knocked Stevenage out of contention with a 3-0 aggregate win. The League One playoff final will be held on Sunday, May 24 at Wembley Stadium between Bolton Wanderers and Stockport. Ryan Reynolds was completely gutted after Wrexham fell short of the playoffs. Wrexham did not qualify for the 2025-26 League One playoffs.
